name: Burp Suite Enterprise
description: Enterprise DAST web vulnerability scanner for automated security testing of web applications

auth_config.description: API key is embedded in the URL path: /{api_key}/v0.1/...

actions.name: List Scans
actions.description: List all scans with their status and summary information

actions.name: Get Scan Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific scan including discovered issues

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Return issues after this issue event index

parameters.name: issue_events
parameters.description: Maximum number of issue events to return

actions.name: Start Scan
actions.description: Launch a new active scan against a target URL

parameters.name: urls
parameters.description: List of target URLs to scan

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Scope configuration with include/exclude URL patterns

parameters.name: scan_configurations
parameters.description: Array of scan configuration objects with type and name

actions.name: Get Issue Definitions
actions.description: Retrieve the knowledge base of all issue type definitions

actions.name: Cancel Scan
actions.description: Cancel a running scan by task ID
